Class MenuService

java.lang.Object
team44.project2.service.MenuService
@ApplicationScoped public class MenuService extends Object
Service class responsible for all menu-item database operations, including fetching categories, items by category, available sizes, add-ons, and performing create, update, and delete operations on menu items and their inventory ingredient links.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MenuService()

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    addMenuItemAndGetId(MenuItem item)
    Inserts a new menu item and returns the generated primary key.
    void
    addMenuItemContent(MenuItemContent content)
    Links an inventory ingredient to a menu item by inserting a MenuItemContent record.
    void
    deleteMenuItem(int menuItemId)
    Permanently removes the menu item with the given ID.
    List<MenuItem>
    getAddOns()
    Returns all available add-on items (items with category 'topping').
    List<String>
    getAllInventoryNames()
    Returns the names of all inventory items, ordered alphabetically, for use in ingredient-row combo boxes.
    List<MenuItem>
    getAllMenuItems()
    Returns every available (non-topping) menu item regardless of category.
    List<String>
    getCategories()
    Returns all distinct non-topping menu categories available in the database.
    List<MenuItem>
    getItemsByCategory(String category)
    Returns all available menu items belonging to the given category.
    int
    getOrAddInventoryItem(String name, String category, BigDecimal currentQty, String unit, BigDecimal reorderThreshold, BigDecimal cost)
    Returns the ID of an existing inventory item with the given name, or inserts a new one if no match is found.
    List<String>
    getSizesForItem(int menuItemId)
    Returns the distinct size options for the menu item identified by menuItemId.
    void
    updateMenuItem(MenuItem item)
    Persists changes to an existing menu item's name, category, size, price, and availability.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • MenuService

      public MenuService()

  • Method Details

    • getCategories

      public List<String> getCategories()
      Returns all distinct non-topping menu categories available in the database.
      Returns:
      An ordered list of category name strings; empty if none exist.

    • getAllMenuItems

      public List<MenuItem> getAllMenuItems()
      Returns every available (non-topping) menu item regardless of category.
      Returns:
      An ordered list of MenuItem records.

    • getItemsByCategory

      public List<MenuItem> getItemsByCategory(String category)
      Returns all available menu items belonging to the given category.
      Parameters:
      category - The category name to filter by.
      Returns:
      An ordered list of matching MenuItem records; empty if the category has no items.

    • getSizesForItem

      public List<String> getSizesForItem(int menuItemId)
      Returns the distinct size options for the menu item identified by menuItemId. Sizes are shared across all variants of the same name.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId - The ID of the base menu item.
      Returns:
      An ordered list of size strings (e.g. "small", "large").

    • getAddOns

      public List<MenuItem> getAddOns()
      Returns all available add-on items (items with category 'topping').
      Returns:
      An ordered list of add-on MenuItem records.

    • updateMenuItem

      public void updateMenuItem(MenuItem item)
      Persists changes to an existing menu item's name, category, size, price, and availability.
      Parameters:
      item - The item to update; must have a valid menuItemId.

    • deleteMenuItem

      public void deleteMenuItem(int menuItemId)
      Permanently removes the menu item with the given ID.
      Parameters:
      menuItemId - The primary key of the item to delete.

    • addMenuItemAndGetId

      public int addMenuItemAndGetId(MenuItem item)
      Inserts a new menu item and returns the generated primary key.
      Parameters:
      item - The item data to insert (ID field is ignored).
      Returns:
      The generated menu_item_id, or -1 if the insert failed.

    • addMenuItemContent

      public void addMenuItemContent(MenuItemContent content)
      Links an inventory ingredient to a menu item by inserting a MenuItemContent record.
      Parameters:
      content - The join-record describing which ingredient and how much.

    • getOrAddInventoryItem

      public int getOrAddInventoryItem(String name, String category, BigDecimal currentQty, String unit, BigDecimal reorderThreshold, BigDecimal cost)
      Returns the ID of an existing inventory item with the given name, or inserts a new one if no match is found.
      Parameters:
      name - The item name to look up or create.
      category - The inventory category.
      currentQty - The initial stock quantity.
      unit - The unit of measurement.
      reorderThreshold - The quantity at which a restock should be triggered.
      cost - The supplier cost per unit.
      Returns:
      The existing or newly generated inventory_id, or -1 on error.

    • getAllInventoryNames

      public List<String> getAllInventoryNames()
      Returns the names of all inventory items, ordered alphabetically, for use in ingredient-row combo boxes.
      Returns:
      An ordered list of inventory item name strings.
